summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VisaXpert app changes requested by user. All 5 requested changes have been successfully implemented and verified: (1) Landing page shows exactly 10 destination countries, (2) Phone validation accepts only 10 or 12 digits on both Landing and Germany Fair pages, (3) Germany Fair page does not contain IUBH/Cologne Business School, (4) University Change page removed '100% Legal Process' text, (5) University Change 'How It Works' has 4 steps only and 'Our Services' removed 'Visa & Immigration'.

Backend phone validation: 10-digit numbers accepted
Backend phone validation: 12-digit numbers accepted
Backend phone validation: 8-digit numbers rejected (422 error)
Backend phone validation: 11-digit numbers rejected (422 error)
Backend phone validation: 13-digit numbers rejected (422 error)
Universal webhook endpoint for lead capture
Dashboard authentication and protected endpoints
Landing page destination cards: exactly 10 countries verified (Canada, Germany, USA, Spain, Ireland, UK, Luxembourg, Australia, Finland, Denmark)
Landing page phone validation: accepts 10 and 12 digits, rejects 8 digits with error message
Landing page trust badges and statistics display correctly
Germany Fair page: IUBH and Cologne Business School NOT present (verified)
Germany Fair page phone validation: accepts 10 and 12 digits, rejects 8 digits with error message
Germany Fair page event schedule with 4 cities and countdown timers
University Change page: '100% Legal Process' text NOT present (verified)
University Change page: 'How It Works' has 4 steps, NO 'Visa & Enrollment' (verified)
University Change page: 'Our Services' does NOT have 'Visa & Immigration' (verified)
University Change page form functionality with transfer types and consultation modes
All WhatsApp and call button integrations working
All page navigation and responsive design working

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all UI components and user requirements verified)
